title: Permissions Context Pack
description: Structured permission surfaces, grants, inheritance, and remediation guidance for Hermes diagnostics.

objects.name: Permission Grant
objects.description: A module-specific permission expressed through roles, overrides, or inferred access.

available_actions.description: Inspect grants, inheritance, and module-role mismatches.

diagnostics.purpose: Catch mismatches between expected role grants and effective permissions.
